title: Inhibition field
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creation, the '''inhibition field''' was a [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] control device that utilized [[dovin basal]]s to keep captives restrained. It would also torture the captive.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-10-26 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
